parameters: some bookkeeping issues. The inn is
honored to be in your presence!

not sure if I'm allowed. Sorry
You promised \N[2] you'd speak to Matilda!
# Told him Bandito Loot hasn't been returned
\p2Are you sure? That was... pretty quick.
just complete the two simple tasks.
# Scarecrows complete, Bandito Loot not returned
\p2I can see the \ii[13] poking out of your pocket...
# Told him Bandito Loot hasn't been returned
\p2Ah, well, come back once you have!
\p2I'll hold up my end of the deal. Let's get
a room and discuss the logistics of the
journey we're about to set out on!
\p2'Scuse me, can we get a room? Here's 30\G.
\innYou are in Room 1, enjoy your stay!
\innAlright! Hope you got a good rest!
I'll just need the room key...
\p2Oh, right, my friend's still in the room.
Let me go wake him up real quick.
time! Toss me the key, will ya'?
\innYou have been checked out. Have a good day!
\p2I'm packed up and ready to go! Got my old
\ii[18] in case we need to set up camp...
\p2Cooking's sorta' my thing. Arguably more than magic.
Whenever I think about a grand journey, I always
get excited when I think about savoring a
delicious meal after a great victory.
\p2And here's a few Bits I had left over...
\p2If you haven't already, we should stop by the stores in town.
There's Dirty Mike's Weapon Smith, Larry's Marvelous Diner,
and Matilda's Magical Warehouse. They all sell great stuff,
just what we'll need to get through Green Slime Cavern!
\p2Oh yeah... you don't know where we're going, do you?
\p2See, there's a rather large cave north of the village.
Green Slime Cavern, we call it, on account
of the Green Slimes that dwell within.
\p2It's not the ideal way past the mountains,
but we're not exactly rolling in Bits
right now, so paying for a ferry is
\innI feel like we never fill up all the rooms here...
I feel like we could make more money if we
rented out the rooms for shop owners,
